MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Plaintiff Lily Ho, (415-279-8882) appears as represented plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Maryann Sioson of the law offices of Brian L. Larsen (415-398-5000) appears by telephone as moving party/attorney seeking to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court hears from client and counsel as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Attorney Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel of Record for PLAINTIFF LILY HO is GRANTED. Court finds good cause. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
